author: kraju
orig: o kurwa nie wiedziałem że małpy oprócz obsługiwania glocka w fawelach potrafią coś wkleić w google tłumacz , widze małpy szybki progres robią
en: oh shit, I didn't know that monkeys, apart from operating a Glock in favelas, can paste something into Google Translator, I see the monkeys are making rapid progress
pt: ah, merda, eu não sabia que os macacos, além de operarem uma Glock nas favelas, podem colar algo no Google Translator, vejo que os macacos estão progredindo rapidamente
label: racist

context.author: kobernn
context.orig: Dziękuję za miłe i uprzejme słowa, tylko wasz kraj pierwszego świata...
context.en: Thank you for your kind and polite words, only your first world country...
context.pt: Obrigado por suas palavras gentis e educadas, apenas seu país de primeiro mundo...
context.label: xenophobic
